heroDesc: Enter your location and usable roof area to estimate capacity, generation, system cost, revenue, and payback period. The result can be sent to our service and sales team for review.
note: The result is a preliminary estimate. Actual returns may vary by roof direction, shading, equipment, construction conditions, and regulations. A professional site evaluation is still required.
formula: Formula: Capacity = area x 0.4 KW; annual generation = capacity x sun hours x 365; system cost = capacity x NT$60,000 / KW; rent estimate = sales revenue x 6%.
modalDesc: Leave your basic information and we will send your estimate to our service and sales team.
name: Name
success: Your information has been sent. Our team will contact you soon.
error: Failed to send. Please try again later.
